     The Numbers Business Report

Teen Titans Go! To The Movies (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $29,790,236Details
International Box Office $22,600,000
Worldwide Box Office $52,390,236
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $585,744
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,040,167
Total $3,625,911
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When the Teen Titans go to the big screen, they go big! Teen Titans GO! to the Movies finds our egocentric, wildly satirical Super Heroes in their first feature film extravaganza—a fresh, gleefully clever, kid-appropriately crass and tongue-in-cheek play on the superhero genre, complete with musical numbers. It seems to the Teens that all the major superheroes out there are starring in their own movies—everyone but the Teen Titans, that is! But de facto leader Robin is determined to remedy the situation, and be seen as a star instead of a sidekick. If only they could get the hottest Hollywood film director to notice them. With a few madcap ideas and a song in their heart, the Teen Titans head to Tinsel Town, certain to pull off their dream. But when the group is radically misdirected by a seriously Super-Villain and his maniacal plan to take over the Earth, things really go awry. The team finds their friendship and their fighting spirit failing, putting the very fate of the Teen Titans themselves on the line!

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,411,189 (34.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.86 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,188 opening theaters/3,188 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $39,109,906

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 27th, 2018 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 27th, 2018 (Wide) (Argentina)
August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
August 3rd, 2018 (Wide), released as Genç Titanlar Filmi (Turkey)
August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
August 10th, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: October 30th, 2018 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for action and rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2525 (Cert #51579), 5/2/2018)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Film format: 2D Digitally Animated Films
Plot point: Celebrity Worship, Coming of Age, Cyborg, Demons, Friendly Alien on Earth, Shapeshifter
Social setting: Movie Business
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Animation Group
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When the Teen Titans go to the big screen, they go big! Teen Titans GO! to the Movies finds our egocentric, wildly satirical Super Heroes in their first feature film extravaganza—a fresh, gleefully clever, kid-appropriately crass and tongue-in-cheek play on the superhero genre, complete with musical numbers. It seems to the Teens that all the major superheroes out there are starring in their own movies—everyone but the Teen Titans, that is! But de facto leader Robin is determined to remedy the situation, and be seen as a star instead of a sidekick. If only they could get the hottest Hollywood film director to notice them. With a few madcap ideas and a song in their heart, the Teen Titans head to Tinsel Town, certain to pull off their dream. But when the group is radically misdirected by a seriously Super-Villain and his maniacal plan to take over the Earth, things really go awry. The team finds their friendship and their fighting spirit failing, putting the very fate of the Teen Titans themselves on the line!
